original_text: The company is pursuing strategic expansion into adjacent travel segments, with CEO Brian Chesky stating the company will be 'going significantly more aggressively into hotels' (C081). Simultaneously, Airbnb is charting an AI-first path for customer service and travel planning, with Chesky noting 'you can't do travel planning without AI going forward' (C083). This strategic direction is supported by substantial R&D investment, with R&D intensity at 19.70% of revenue in Q2 2025 (K005). The company faces competition from traditional online travel agencies like Expedia, which also posted strong earnings in the period (C084).
revised_text: The company is pursuing strategic expansion into adjacent travel segments, with CEO Brian Chesky stating the company will be 'going significantly more aggressively into hotels' (C010). Simultaneously, Airbnb is charting an AI-first path for customer service and travel planning, with Chesky noting 'you can't do travel planning without AI going forward' (C012). This strategic direction is supported by substantial R&D investment, with R&D intensity at 19.70% of revenue in Q2 2025 (K005). The company faces competition from traditional online travel agencies like Expedia, which also posted strong earnings in the period (C013).
changes_summary: Corrected three unsupported citation errors identified by the fact-checker. Replaced invalid chunk C081 with C010 for the CEO's statement on hotel expansion. Replaced invalid chunk C083 with C012 for the CEO's statement on AI. Replaced invalid chunk C084 with C013 to support the claim regarding Expedia's earnings. Retained the valid R&D intensity claim supported by calc_id K005.
